"use strict"; var pattern = /-(\w|$)/g; var callback = function callback(dashChar, char) { return char.toUpperCase(); }; var camelCaseCSS = function camelCaseCSS(property) { property = property.toLowerCase(); // NOTE :: IE8's "styleFloat" is intentionally not supported if (property === "float") { return "cssFloat"; } // Microsoft vendor-prefixes are uniquely cased else if (property.charCodeAt(0) === 45&& property.charCodeAt(1) === 109&& property.charCodeAt(2) === 115&& property.charCodeAt(3) === 45) { return property.substr(1).replace(pattern, callback); } else { return property.replace(pattern, callback); } }; module.exports = camelCaseCSS;
